_rationale.purpose: Parity proof for DART-6lwWAw28lQfj: `lci search --regex --invert-match` must mirror Go reference. Go's `lci search` accepts `--invert-match` but the standard / integrated display path ignores it (see cmd/lci/search.go:103-156 — flag forwarded into SearchOptions but displayStandardResultsWithAssembly never applies it). Prior C++ post-filtered client-side using the trigram literal seed (not the regex) and rebuilt rows from raw file contents, producing 7 invert rows where Go produced 2 standard-format result blocks.
_rationale.fix: src/cli/search.cpp run_search no longer post-filters on grep-style flags; emits a one-line stderr notice (suppressed under --json) and falls through to the standard display path. Mirrors Go.
_rationale.tier: stable: stdout must match Go byte-for-byte after standard text_normalize (DEBUG strip, mode-label collapse, timing scrub).
